children.name: AssertionError: 消息断言失败(包含匹配): 期望包含'密码', 实际='账号不存在'
TC_LOGIN_002 异常登录-错误密码
parameters: TestCase(case_id='TC_LOGIN_002', case_name='异常登录-错误密码', description='使用正确的账号但错误密码登录，验证登录失败', priority='P1', data={'account': 'WX0000', 'password': 'wrong_password'}, expected={'http_status': 200, 'format': 'login', 'success': False, 'status': '500', 'msg_contains': '密码'})

children.name: AssertionError: HTTP状态码断言失败: 期望=200, 实际=404, 响应={"timestamp":"2026-07-24 11:15:27","status":404,"error":"Not Found","message":"No message available","path":"/app/xl/unit/login/WX0001/"}

parameters: TestCase(case_id='TC_LOGIN_004', case_name='异常登录-空密码', description='密码为空字符串，验证登录失败', priority='P2', data={'account': 'WX0001', 'password': ''}, expected={'http_status': 200, 'format': 'login', 'success': False, 'status': '500'})

children.name: AssertionError: HTTP状态码断言失败: 期望=200, 实际=404, 响应={"timestamp":"2026-07-24 11:15:27","status":404,"error":"Not Found","message":"No message available","path":"/app/xl/unit/login//test123"}

children.name: AssertionError: 业务码断言失败: 期望=500, 实际=0
TC_REG_004 异常注册-缺少法定代表人
parameters: TestCase(case_id='TC_REG_004', case_name='异常注册-缺少法定代表人', description='缺少必填字段legalRepresentative，验证注册失败', priority='P1', data={'supplierName': '测试公司_缺法人_{{timestamp_short}}', 'businessLicenseNo': '91110000MA02{{random}}', 'blIssuingAuthority': '重庆市市场监督管理局', 'blStartDate': '2024-05-10', 'blEndDate': '2034-05-09', 'contactsName': '{{name}}', 'contactsPhone': '{{mobile}}', 'bussinessType': 'short_jx', 'isSelfAccess': '0'}, expected={'http_status': 200, 'code': 500})
